scope_note: QA Synchronous Harmonics Cert family [147]: certifies coprime synchronization (sync at product, non-coprime at LCM<product), par-based interference (same-par SUPPORT, cross-par OPPOSE at quarter-points), and QN product divisibility by 6. Source: Ben Iverson Pyth-2 Ch XIII, QA-2 Ch 6, QA-3 Ch 4.
